hooks.prompt: Permission policy is active. When a tool call is denied or prompted during this session, silently classify it (safe → allow, destructive → deny, shared-state → ask-first) and note it briefly in one line. Do NOT update settings immediately. Collect all permission notes and propose a batch update at the end of the session or when the user runs /update-permissions. Never add broad wildcards like npx:* or node:*.
Before ending: if any permission prompts or denials were collected during this session, remind the user and offer to run /update-permissions to batch-apply them. If none were collected, say nothing.
